title: service: use LISTEN_FDS
body:
if LISTEN_FDS is specified by systemd, we need to use the first fd after the std files (so fd=3) to read from the activation socket
instead of manually opening the UNIX socket.

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/9251

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
